title: AL's Spiders Revamped
description: A pack that revamps Spiders and adds more variants!
body:
![Spiders Revamped logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/db79cc9dee0c237997e996547a91125de6348095.png)

# 

A pack that revamps Spiders and adds more variants  by changing the models and textures!

I made this as a more "Vanilla style" pack while still giving them a well needed revamp.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/jSTOYt4Rt8s" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

 

This pack adds things like a more anatomically accurate model, Biome-dependent variants, Scorpions, Crabs, and more!

 

 

Nametag-only Renamable Spider Skins/Variants

*Taranchama

*Australian Rat

 

 

Note:

If a Spider is being ridden by a Skeleton, the Spider will have a custom texture!  (This is to match the Skeleton Jockeys from my other pack: AL's Skeletons Revamped)

Mod compatibility:

*Unique Spider and Cave Spider variants can be found when this pack is used alongside the Dungeons & Taverns mod!

 

Make sure that these are all set to "ON":

Custom Entity Models
Random Entities

Emissive Textures

You can find these toggles by going into:

Options>Video Settings>Quality
